name: copyFile
description: Creates a copy of a file or document in Google Drive. Returns the new copy's ID and URL.

fileId.description: The file or folder ID from a Google Drive URL or a previous tool result.

newName.description: Name for the copied file. If not provided, will use "Copy of [original name]".

parentFolderId.description: ID of folder where copy should be placed. If not provided, places in same location as original.
